pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java source and target version properties from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.2 to support JDK 21 features and security patches.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not fully support or run correctly on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or handle new language features correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable parameter name retention in maven-compiler-plugin to support Spring MVC path variable binding without @Param annotations.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring MVC relies on parameter names for binding; without this flag, runtime binding errors occur if debug info is stripped.
